children.text: for fiscal year 2008, an amount equal to the amount appropriated for fiscal year 2007 for administration and operations of the Agency, multiplied by 1.1;
for fiscal year 2009, an amount equal to the amount described in paragraph (1), multiplied by 1.1; and
for fiscal year 2010, an amount equal to the amount described in paragraph (2), multiplied by 1.1.
